title: Comms Response
description: Operator's reply, embedded inline in the request file at .response. Written by the Telegram bot once it has matched a callback or text message back to the originating request_id + question_id(s).

answered_at.description: UTC timestamp of the LAST answer received (updated as questions get answered one by one).

selected_ids.description: For choice/multi_choice/yes_no answers: the chosen choice.id values.

free_text.description: For free_text answers, OR the operator's typed reply when answer_type='other'.

status.description: partial=at least one answer received but required questions remain; complete=every required question answered; invalid=bot received a reply it could not parse against the schema.

notes.description: Optional bot-side diagnostic text (e.g. why the response was marked invalid).
